P0_Critical.name: Layout Duplication Issue
P0_Critical.description: Removed nested router-view from App.vue and updated MainLayout to use router-view instead of slot
P0_Critical.testing: Navigate to any authenticated page - should show single navigation elements
P0_Critical.impact: Eliminates duplicate sidebar and header on all pages

P0_Critical.name: Authentication User Data
P0_Critical.description: Added setUser method to auth store and updated login flow to store user data
P0_Critical.testing: Login with admin/admin123 - header should display actual username
P0_Critical.impact: Header shows dynamic user data instead of hardcoded 'Admin'

P0_Critical.name: API Client Debug Mode
P0_Critical.description: Added debug mode with comprehensive API logging and improved error handling
P0_Critical.testing: Set VITE_DEBUG=true and check browser console for API logs

P0_Critical.name: Network Data Format Mismatch
P0_Critical.description: Updated network data handling to support backend interfaces structure (bytesRecv/bytesSent)
P0_Critical.testing: Check dashboard network statistics - should show non-zero values
P0_Critical.impact: Network monitoring now displays correct data

P0_Critical.name: CPU Usage Display Error
P0_Critical.description: Fixed CPU usage display to convert decimal values to percentages (0.016 → 1.6%)
P0_Critical.testing: Navigate to /monitor/cpu - should show percentages like 15.6%
P0_Critical.impact: CPU monitoring displays correct percentage values

P1_High.name: Network Interface Filtering
P1_High.description: Added filtering to exclude virtual interfaces (docker, virbr, veth) from network statistics
P1_High.testing: Run Docker containers - network stats should exclude docker interfaces
P1_High.impact: Accurate network statistics without virtual interface inflation

P1_High.name: Authentication Error Cleanup
P1_High.description: Added user data cleanup in 401 error handler
P1_High.testing: Force token expiry - verify user data removed from localStorage

P2_Medium.name: Debug Test Page
P2_Medium.description: Simple test page for layout verification
P2_Medium.testing: Navigate to /debug-test - should show single layout

quickTest: 2. Start backend: cd /home/hserver/nas-dashboard/backend && go run cmd/server/main.go
3. Start frontend: cd /home/hserver/nas-dashboard/frontend && npm run dev
8. Navigate to /monitor/cpu - verify percentages display correctly
9. Check browser console for debug logs
comprehensiveTest: Navigation: All pages show single layout
Authentication: User data stored and displayed correctly
Dashboard: All statistics show accurate values
Debug Mode: API calls logged in console

knownLimitations: Backend still has hardcoded passwords (not fixed in frontend)
WebSocket authentication not implemented (backend fix needed)
CORS configuration may be too permissive (backend fix needed)

rolloutPlan.phase2: Bug fixes based on testing results
